  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

Abs X84 Bosch8.1 V1.3

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 740
Recv ID: 760
Baudrate: 500000
Func Addr: 01
Func Name: ABS-VDC - ABS-ESP

    "diagversion": "15",
    "supplier": "037",

    "minbytes": 2,
    "shiftbytescount": 3,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "17FF00",
    "name": "ReadDTC",
    "deny_sds": [],

        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {

      },

        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 1

        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },
      "Standard Fault": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 3
      },

        "firstbyte": 5
      },

        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 3
      }

        "firstbyte": 11

        "firstbyte": 11,
        "bitoffset": 2

        "firstbyte": 11,

        "firstbyte": 7

        "firstbyte": 6
      },

        "firstbyte": 14,
        "bitoffset": 3
      },
      "Temps depuis IgnOn (Freeze)": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      },
      "Alimentation (Freeze)": {
        "firstbyte": 10
      },
      "Cycle de roulage (Freeze)": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "Etat allumage automatique des warnings (Freeze)": {
        "firstbyte": 11,
        "bitoffset": 3
      },
      "Etat de la sortie feux stop (Freeze)": {
        "firstbyte": 11,
        "bitoffset": 7
      }
    }
  },

        "ref": true

        "ref": true

        "ref": true

        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 14,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 14,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 23,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Système Serveur": {
        "firstbyte": 22,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Code MPR": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Semaine de production du bloc": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
